name: HRFlow Analytics & Insights Agent
description: Provides company-wide HR analytics: headcount, attrition, hiring pipeline, and department statistics for data-driven decisions.

skills.name: Get Headcount
skills.description: Get current headcount breakdown by department.

skills.name: Get Attrition Report
skills.description: Get employee turnover report with department breakdown.

skills.name: Get Hiring Pipeline
skills.description: Get recruitment pipeline status with time-to-hire metrics.

skills.name: Get Department Stats
skills.description: Get detailed statistics for a specific department.
